name: External A2A Bridge Demo
description: Platform-hosted agents collaborating with a Vercel-hosted external A2A agent using multi-turn context exchange and inline file delivery back into the platform

Platform_Bridge_Desk.description: Entry agent that hands user turns to the hosted external agent and handles callback-prefixed platform work locally

Platform_Research_Local.description: Platform-local research specialist for callback turns from the hosted external service

Platform_File_Local.description: Platform-local file receiver for inline A2A file delivery from the hosted external service

supporting_infrastructure.external-vercel-agent: Next.js service under external-vercel-agent/ that exposes A2A endpoints and calls this project back through a platform A2A connection
